snippet.title: Honeywell’s Global Strategy & High-Growth Emerging Markets | Vimal Kapur | Sharma India Lecture
snippet.description:
In this discussion, Vimal Kapur, President and newly appointed Chief Executive Officer of Honeywell, shared his thoughts on Honeywell's Global Strategy and High-Growth Emerging Markets as part of the Center for Emerging Vivek and Vandana Sharma India Lecture Series.

 

As President and Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Honeywell, Vimal creates new solutions to help customers drive their sustainability transformations and accelerate their digital transformation journeys. In addition, Vimal oversees Honeywell's operating system, Honeywell Accelerator, and oversees Honeywell's five strategic business groups.

snippet.title: Vimal Kapur named Honeywell CEO | Diya TV News
snippet.description:
VIMAL KAPUR NAMED HONEYWELL CEO
Indian American Vimal Kapur will take over as Honeywell CEO. He has more than three decades of experience leading the diversified manufacturer's various businesses. The 57-year-old Kapur will take over the top role on June 1, roughly 10 months after he was appointed Honeywell's president and chief operating officer.


TEJAL MEHTA JOINS MASSACHUSETTS DISTRICT COURT
In Massachusetts, Indian American Tejal Mehta has taken the oath to become the first justice of the Ayer District Court. She has served as an associate justice with the same court and promised to make a real impact to the community and treat people with compassion.


"THE ELEPHANT WHISPERERS" WINS OSCAR FOR SHORT DOC
Director Kartiki Gonsalves and producer Guneet Monga  claimed Oscars after their short documentary "The Elephant Whisperers" won at the Academy Awards. The documentary focuses on an orphaned elephant in the care of a couple and is the first Indian documentary to win in this category.

snippet.title: Honeywell Connect 2023 with Michael Ruiz, VP/GM of Cyber Innovation
snippet.description:
Day 2 of Honeywell Connect 2023 kicked off and Leonard Lee had the chance to chat with Michael Ruiz, VP/GM of Cyber Innovation at Honeywell. One of the big themes at Honeywell Connect this year has been OT/IT cybersecurity convergence and its importance in enabling safe and secure digital transformation. We also chat about some of Honeywell Forge.ai's new OT cybersecurity offerings - Cyber Insights and Cyber Watch. Michael drops some serious knowledge, so check this chat out!

For those of you who don't know, Honeywell Connected Enterprise is the company's software and analytics business that is spearheading its digital reinvention. Honeywell Connect brings together leaders in customer organizations to focus on digital transformation, sustainability, and cybersecurity.

The whole of Honeywell will be present at this year's event with the who's who of the business and technology leadership of the company including new Honeywell CEO, Vimal Kapur in attendance and presenting.

This year's speaker roster is pretty amazing. Check it out here: https://bit.ly/3rduMwc

Remember to follow my coverage of Honeywell Connect 2023 and many other industry events at www.next-curve.com. Please subscribe to the neXt Curve newsletter at: https://bit.ly/3qP7blc

snippet.title: Honeywell Connect 2023 with Ravi Srinivasan, VP/GM of Industrial Innovation
snippet.description:
neXt Curve was in Dallas for Day 1 of Honeywell Connect 2023. Leonard Lee had a chance to chat with Ravikrishnan Srinivasan, VP/GM of Industrial Innovation at Honeywell to talk about the company's deep and long legacy in #sustainability and how the core of what the company does for its customers in the area of performance improvement and optimization directly lends to the company's unique position in addressing some of the biggest sustainability challenges of our time.

Ravi provides some great pointers on how organizations that are increasingly pressured to deliver on their sustainability commitments can transition from estimating their progress toward measuring their impact in a continuous and accountable way.

For those of you who don't know, Honeywell Connected Enterprise is the company's software and analytics business that is spearheading its digital reinvention. Honeywell Connect brings together leaders in customer organizations to focus on digital transformation, sustainability, and cybersecurity.

snippet.title: Manish Sharma: Unveiling Honeywell Forge for Buildings - Revolutionizing Sustainable Solutions
snippet.description:
Join us for an exclusive interview with Manish Sharma, the leader of sustainable solutions at Honeywell. In this captivating YouTube video, Mannish unveils the groundbreaking technology, Honeywell Forge for Buildings, and shares insights into its transformative impact on building operations and sustainability.

Discover how Honeywell Forge for Buildings combines software, hardware, and services to deliver tangible business outcomes, from driving sustainability goals to enhancing occupant experience and mobilizing operational efficiency. Mannish provides a deep dive into the features and benefits of this comprehensive solution, highlighting its ability to create resilient, safe, and secure buildings while managing compliance effectively.

Gain valuable insights from Manish Sharma's expertise as he shares Honeywell's innovative approach to building operations, including the importance of multi-asset coverage, autonomous control, open protocols, and a global partner network. Learn how Honeywell Forge for Buildings simplifies building management through its unified user experience and empowers organizations to optimize their operations in various industries, from airports to healthcare and retail to smart cities.

Whether you are a building owner, operator, or sustainability enthusiast, this interview offers valuable knowledge and inspiration for driving key business outcomes and contributing to a more sustainable future. Don't miss this opportunity to learn about Honeywell Forge for Buildings directly from Manish Sharma, a thought leader in sustainable solutions.

Watch the interview now and unlock the potential of Honeywell Forge for Buildings. Join the digital transformation and be a part of the revolution in building operations. Subscribe to our channel for more insightful content on sustainability, technology, and innovation.

snippet.title: Honeywell Automation's Ashish Gaikwad Exclusive On The Firm's Subdued Q3FY23 Results | CNBC-TV18
snippet.description:
Honeywell Automation India reported an 18.2% rise in net profit to Rs 106.07 crore in Q3 FY23 as against Rs 89.73 crore posted in Q3 FY22.

Net sales stood at Rs 1,017.49 crore in the quarter ended 31 December 2022, up 18.3% from Rs 859.95 crore recorded in the corresponding quarter last fiscal.

Profit before tax rose 18.2% to Rs 143.71 crore in Q3 FY23 as compared to Rs 121.60 crore reported in the same period a year ago.

In an exclusive conversation with CNBC-TV18, Ashish Gaikwad, Managing Director, Honeywell Automation India, speaks on the firm's Q3FY23 results. Listen in.

snippet.title: ADIPEC 2023: Interview with Johan de Villiers
snippet.description: Johan de Villiers, Regional Division President IMEA, #ABBenergyindustries, reflects with Anusha Ravindranath on #ADIPEC and talks about how the #EnergyTransition is challenging because it will take time. He says: "We need to deploy the technology we have today as fast as possible while we are developing the technology of tomorrow."
